_metadata.description: Per-county Property Appraiser portal config (Phase 1a anchor source). Distinct from county_tax_urls.json (tax bill data) and recorder configs (deed search). PA provides APN + owner of record + sale history for the SIMMONS subject-property gate and ANAND back-chain recovery.

fl_broward.description: Broward County Property Appraiser — ASP.NET WebMethod API on bcpa.net. Probed 2026-05-26 — see /tmp/bcpa_probe.md.

fl_hillsborough.description: Hillsborough County Property Appraiser — REST/JSON API on gis.hcpafl.org/CommonServices. Backed by Knockout SPA at /propertysearch. Probed 2026-05-26 — endpoints discovered via viewModels.js: BasicSearch (address/folio/owner -> list[parcel-summary]), ParcelData?pin=PIN (full parcel + salesHistory[]), Autocomplete?value=X&table=address (jQuery-UI autocomplete for address typeahead).

fl_manatee.description: Manatee County Property Appraiser — WordPress + Frontier child theme; per-purpose pao-model-*.php endpoints. SearchQ POST is a JSON array of {name,value} field criteria. Per-parcel data spread across 6 endpoints (owner POST returns HTML; sales/addresses/value-history/exemptions GET return {cols,rows} JSON). Probed 2026-05-27 — see /tmp/manateepao_probe.md.

manatee.description: Alias matching the recorder-side county_id used by workflow_config (manatee). Same adapter as fl_manatee.

fl_orange.description: Orange County (FL) Property Appraiser — Angular SPA at ocpaweb.ocpafl.org backed by Azure-Front-Door-fronted REST API at ocpa-mainsite-afd-standard.azurefd.net. Auth via static x-user-key header (GUID extracted from bundled JS — public-by-design). TLS-fingerprinted: REQUIRES curl_cffi(impersonate=chrome120) to bypass AFD's plain-requests 403. parcelId is 15-digit numeric Sec-Twp-Rng-Subdiv-Block-Lot; canonical APN form NN-NN-NN-NNNN-NN-NNN. Probed live 2026-05-26 against MIRANDA subject 7313 TWILIGHT BAY DR (pid 272333545802830).

fl_palm_beach.description: Palm Beach County Property Appraiser (PAPA) — pbcpao.gov serves Property/Details HTML directly. Probed live 2026-05-26 against HABER subject (PCN 00-41-47-22-04-000-1090 / unhyphenated 00414722040001090) — 146 KB HTML carries owner, mailing address, situs, legal description, 5-year + 10-year assessment tables, sales history back to 1995, and exemption status. Address-only search requires antiforgery + page tokens not yet reverse-engineered; address calls return PA_AMBIGUOUS with the AdvSearch landing URL. Use lookup_by_apn() with the PCN extracted from the Landmark recorder index column 15 legal field (Landmark adapter exposes this via _extract_pcn_from_legal).

fl_pasco.description: Pasco County Property Appraiser — in-house ASP.NET WebForms on bare IIS at search.pascopa.com. ALL searches are plain GET querystrings (pid=add/nam/orb + key=GLI; parcel.aspx takes sec/twn/rng/sbb/blk/lot). Probed 2026-06-10 — see 0610/Pasco_RILEY_v1/phase0_probe_pa.md. Result/parcel-page HTML shape fixture-locked, live-verify in Wave 2.

form_fields._warning: address field name is a Wave-1 best-evidence GUESS — geo-block prevented live capture; harvest real name= attrs from Basic/Search.aspx on first US-egress run and update

fl_duval.description: Duval County Property Appraiser (City of Jacksonville) — ASP.NET WebForms at paopropertysearch.coj.net. APN = 10-digit RE number (display XXXXXX-XXXX). Direct detail: GET Basic/Detail.aspx?RE=<10 digits> (no VIEWSTATE). Adapter: src/titlepro/property_appraiser/counties/duval_pao.py (factory branch 'duval_pao' already wired in property_appraiser/__init__.py this wave). Host geo-blocks non-US egress at TCP level.

fl_brevard.description: Brevard County Property Appraiser — BCPAO REST JSON API v1. ⚠️ Cloudflare MANAGED CHALLENGE blocks curl_cffi for ALL impersonation profiles (probed live 2026-06-10, 403 on every profile). Adapter (brevard_bcpao.py) + 18 unit tests complete on canned fixtures. To go live: mint cf_clearance cookie via interactive browser session and inject into cf_cookies (TTL ~30d) — same Cloudflare playbook as Broward recorder. Then add platform branch in src/titlepro/property_appraiser/__init__.py: elif platform=='bcpao_http': from .counties.brevard_bcpao import BrevardBCPAO; adapter=BrevardBCPAO(cfg).

fl_lee.description: Lee County Property Appraiser (LeePA) — leepa.org ASP.NET WebForms. Probed live 2026-06-10 against OSTIGUY (STRAP 29-44-24-C2-00101.0150 / FolioID 10176930). Address search POST -> result grid (STRAP + FolioID + owners + situs); DisplayParcel GET -> FL DOR NAL field dump (F01..F92) parsed for owner/legal/values/year/homestead. No Cloudflare/Akamai/CAPTCHA on leepa.org. Sale history restricted for some parcels (instruments 'not viewable by the general public') — deed back-chain via the Lee Clerk recorder. Adapter: src/titlepro/property_appraiser/counties/lee_leepa.py (platform leepa_http, registered in property_appraiser/__init__.py this session). 24 unit tests green.

fl_polk.description: Polk County Property Appraiser — custom ASP.NET WebForms CAMA at www.polkpa.org (CamaDisplay.aspx parcel page, AdvancedQuerySearch.aspx). Adapter at src/titlepro/property_appraiser/counties/polk_pa.py — HTML scrape, label-driven parser. Reverse-engineered 2026-06-10 from Wayback (live host firewall/geo-fenced — TCP-unreachable from Wave-1 egress). WAVE-2: capture a real CamaDisplay.aspx body, confirm the parcel-detail querystring + the address-search __VIEWSTATE POST, tune _FIELD_LABELS, then move to address-capable. lookup_by_apn() is the canonical path (APN from recorder deed legal or from the PA strap). DOMAIN UPDATE 2026-06-10: county moved to www.polkflpa.gov (polkpa.org stale) — live-verified during the BUNKER run (CamaSearch.aspx/CamaDisplay.aspx same paths).

fl_sarasota.description: Sarasota County Property Appraiser — custom ASP.NET MVC app at sc-pa.com/propertysearch. Bare IIS, no anti-bot, no CSRF on the search form. Single POST to /propertysearch/Result with AddressKeywords | OwnerKeywords | Strap (digits, maxlength 12). Adapter at src/titlepro/property_appraiser/counties/sarasota_scpa.py. Probed 2026-06-10 — see src/titlepro/api/downloaded_doc/0610/Sarasota_BRUNO_v1/phase0_probe_pa.md. Result/detail HTML shapes fixture-driven; re-validate on first approved live query (Wave 2).

fl_seminole.description: Seminole County Property Appraiser (scpafl.org). LIVE-VALIDATED 2026-06-10: ArcGIS parcel layer production/modal_map/MapServer/19 (portal-proxied via /gis/sharing/servers/b1408f8c...). Fields: Parcel/ParcelFormat/ApprId/OwnerName/PrimaryAddress/MailingAddress/LegalDescription/TotalJustValue/AssessedValue/TaxableValue/HasHomestead/YearBuilt/TotalLivingArea/LastSaleDate/LastSaleAmt. PrimaryAddress uses USPS-abbreviated suffixes (LN not LANE). Layer exposes most-recent sale only - full chain from recorder. Adapter: seminole_scpa.py.

fl_volusia.notes: Live-validated 2026-06-10 against GUILD (435 ELSIE AVE HOLLY HILL): POST /api/search/real-property (DataTables form body, search[value] accepts name/address/altkey/parcel) -> rows {altkey,parcel,owner,street,pc} ONE ROW PER OWNER; GET /parcel/summary/?altkey={altkey} requires cookie acceptedNewDisclaimer=true (adapter sets it) and returns server-rendered owners + manner of holding + short legal + FULL sales history (Book/Page + Instrument + Deed Type + Qualified + price) with hyperlinks to the recorder direct-retrieval endpoint. No anti-bot. Adapter: src/titlepro/property_appraiser/counties/volusia_vcpa.py (23 unit tests green; dispatcher branch 'vcpa_http' already wired in property_appraiser/__init__.py).

fl_escambia.address_search_caveat: Address search resolves the FIRST 16-digit Parcel ID in the result grid; the grid returns substring matches (e.g. '211 N PALAFOX ST' surfaces '6211/221/2110 N PALAFOX ST' rows too) so the first row may not be the exact-address parcel. APN-anchored lookup (the production PA-anchor path, keyed off the recorder deed APN) is exact. Engineering follow-up: tighten _resolve_parcel_id_by_address to pick the exact-situs row.
fl_escambia.description: Escambia County PA (ESCPA) escpa.org ASP.NET WebForms. Detail is a DIRECT GET by 16-digit Parcel ID (Detail_a.aspx?s=<parcelID>); address search via Search.aspx VIEWSTATE postback (txtValue + chkSubParcels) -> SearchResultList grid -> Parcel ID. LIVE-CONFIRMED 2026-06-17 from US egress: lookup_by_apn('000S009007003004') returns PA_SUCCESS matching the captured fixture field-by-field (owner/folio/situs/just_value 841501/assessed 816465/4 newest-first sale rows). Required a parser fix: live BeautifulSoup.get_text renders every table cell on its own line plus a 'Nav. Mode' bare-label preamble, which broke the single-line-row + after() parsers; _normalize_text() now collapses both the live per-cell layout and the captured-fixture single-line layout into one shape (escambia_pa.py, all 7 fixture tests still green).

fl_st_johns._probe: qPublic/Schneider AppID=960. Re-challenged 2026-06-19: NOT Cloudflare-gated from datacenter (Datacamp/Seattle) — the 2026-06-17 block was transient burst-rate, not a residential gate. PA_SUCCESS confirmed: APN=0000200100 SMITH KENNETH R. Detail pages require full session-bound href (PageTypeID=4&LayerID=...&PageID=...&Q=...) — fixed in adapter 2026-06-19 (was using simplified PageType=Details which returns 500 on this tenant). Throttle: Schneider applies an app-level reCAPTCHA gate after ~6-8 rapid search+detail requests per IP session; space runs 30s+ apart. Probe: docs/FL/source/landmark_pa_probe/fl_st_johns/probe_observed.md
fl_st_johns.live_smoke: 2026-06-19: PA_SUCCESS APN=0000200100 SMITH KENNETH R (SMITH owner search)
fl_st_johns.throttle_note: Schneider reCAPTCHA after ~6-8 rapid requests per IP session; space 30s+

fl_citrus.apn_search_caveat: realprop inpParid keys on the numeric altkey/folio (e.g. 1772311), NOT the geo strap Parcel ID (20E19S210020 02280 0400). Reach the anchor via address lookup; its result.folio is the realprop key.
fl_citrus._probe: Tyler/TrueAutomation EagleWeb (ProVal Web) — _web/search/commonsearch.aspx?mode=<address|realprop|owner> + Disclaimer.aspx VIEWSTATE accept -> searchResults grid -> Datalets/Datalet.aspx?mode=profileall. No Cloudflare (plain IIS). Submit must POST to the mode-qualified URL with all hidden form state harvested verbatim (bare-URL POST -> 'page not registered'). Adapter validated against 4 captured fixtures (tests/unit/fixtures/citrus/) + live address+folio lookup 2026-06-18 (US egress). Probe: docs/FL/source/landmark_pa_probe/fl_citrus/probe_observed.md

fl_okeechobee._probe: SCAFFOLD — recorder+tax ready; PA anchor pending. VERIFY base_url and capture address-search + parcel-detail + sale-history shape live before implementing. Module: property_appraiser/counties/okeechobee_pa.py

fl_miami_dade.description: Miami-Dade County Property Appraiser (MDCPA) — public REST/JSON proxy at apps.miamidadepa.gov/PApublicServiceProxy/PaServicesProxy.ashx that backs the official Angular Property Search SPA (www.miamidade.gov/Apps/PA/PropertySearch/ -> redirects to apps.miamidadepa.gov/PropertySearch/). Single endpoint; the Operation param selects the call: GetAddress (myAddress/myUnit/from/to -> MinimumPropertyInfos[] with Strap=hyphenated folio); GetPropertySearchByFolio (folioNumber=13-digit -> full parcel + SalesInfos[]). LIVE-VALIDATED 2026-06-17 (US egress) against 111 NW 1 ST / folio 01-4137-023-0020 (Govt Center) + 7500 SW 82 ST G105 / folio 30-4035-047-2550 (Dadeland condo). NO Cloudflare/Akamai/CAPTCHA. See docs/FL/source/miami_dade_pa_probe.md; raw fixtures tests/unit/fixtures/miami_dade/. NOTE: this is the PUBLIC Property Appraiser, DISTINCT from the paywalled Miami-Dade Clerk Official Records recorder (miamidadeclerk.gov; see docs/FL/miami_dade_probe.md). Folio = 13-digit (display NN-NNNN-NNN-NNNN). Module: property_appraiser/counties/miami_dade_mdcpa.py (mdcpa_http branch wired in property_appraiser/__init__.py). KNOWN GAP: MDCPA feed has NO DeedType (and grantor/grantee came back blank) -> recorder cross-ref fills deed type; sale feed is oldest-first (SaleId 1 == newest) and the adapter sorts newest-first.

fl_lake._probe: Lake County FL — county-custom ASP.NET WebForms at lakecopropappr.com. Three-step: TOU gate (POST /property-disclaimer.aspx) → search (POST /property-search.aspx, street name only, not full address) → detail (GET /property-details.aspx?AltKey=<7-digit>). No Cloudflare / Akamai, plain IIS. Live-validated 2026-06-18 (PA_SUCCESS, AltKey=3904456, BROWN at 3513 BELLAND CIR UNIT D, CLERMONT). Fixtures: tests/unit/fixtures/pa_lake/.
fl_lake.apn_search_caveat: search uses AltKey (7-digit int), not the parcel number (03-23-26-0109-000-012C0). APN is the dotted parcel number from the detail page.

fl_sumter._probe: Sumter County FL — qPublic/Schneider AppID=1207. Live-validated 2026-06-19: NOT Cloudflare-gated from datacenter egress (AppID=1207 search page returns 200 with SearchIntents: OwnerName/ParcelID/Address/LegalDesc/STR). Report pages use 'Site Location' / 'Legal Description' / 'Owner' labels (not 'Location Address' / 'Brief Tax Description' / 'Owner Information' — fixed in qpublic_schneider_pa_http.py parse_detail_html + parse_grid_html 2026-06-19). Fixtures: tests/unit/fixtures/pa_sumter/. Subject: TEGGE ROBERT L, D33G061, 2053 LARKWOOD CT, THE VILLAGES.
fl_sumter.live_smoke: 2026-06-19: smoke_pass AppID=1207 search page 200; offline tests PA_SUCCESS TEGGE

fl_de_soto._probe: De Soto County FL — Grizzly GIS (FloridaPA.com) JavaScript SPA at desotopa.com/gis/. The GIS app uses OpenLayers + a legacy MapServer CGI (gz.floridapa.com/mapserver/), with a custom JS app (gisMain.js, gisMain_Features.js). All search interaction is browser-side; no accessible REST endpoint found during 2026-06-19 probe. ssl cert on gz_DeSoto.FloridaPA.com is invalid for direct access. Datacenter-reachable: YES (desotopa.com 200, no CF). Platform: NOT HTTP-accessible via curl_cffi without SSL bypass and MapServer CGI reverse-engineering. DEFERRED: requires browser-network-capture to identify exact search API shape (same category as hernando/martin/okeechobee custom JS SPAs from the Landmark probe). Engineering ticket: probe gisMain.js mapserver endpoint with `verify=False` + SSL bypass.
fl_de_soto.live_smoke: 2026-06-19: desotopa.com 200, gis page 200, search endpoint not found

fl_franklin._probe: Franklin County FL — qPublic/Schneider. AppID confirmed CF-gated: direct probe of qpublic.schneidercorp.com with AppID=1167 returns 'Just a moment...' 403 (Cloudflare Bot-Manager managed challenge) from datacenter egress. AppID=1167 confirmed as Franklin County KY (wrong county), so FL Franklin AppID is UNKNOWN — FL Franklin may not be on qPublic. The franklincountytaxcollector.com redirects to VisualGov (cloudservices.visualgov.com/FLFranklinMobile) which is for the Tax Collector only, not the PA. No accessible FL Franklin PA portal found from datacenter egress. Engineering ticket: (1) identify correct PA portal via residential probe of franklincountyfl.gov; (2) if on qPublic determine AppID; (3) if on VisualGov build a VisualGov adapter.
fl_franklin.live_smoke: 2026-06-19: no accessible portal found from datacenter

fl_nassau._probe: Nassau County FL — Nassau County Property Appraiser at nassauflpa.com. The site is WordPress-based with a /Search/Default.aspx endpoint. Currently returning 503 Maintenance page (title: 'Maintenance – Nassau County Property Appraiser'). The maintenance page has no ETA. County official site (nassaucountyfl.com) does not carry a fallback PA search tool. No other accessible PA endpoint found. Status: maintenance_503. Action: re-probe nassauflpa.com for 200 before running Nassau subjects. When live, the /Search/Default.aspx endpoint likely requires a TOU accept + address/owner search (typical FL county PA WebForms pattern). Engineering ticket: monitor nassauflpa.com for restoration; capture /Search/Default.aspx live HTML to build adapter.

fl_leon.description: Leon County Property Appraiser — ASP.NET MVC DataTables serverSide at search.leonpa.gov. TOU gate + ExecutePropertySearch JSON + /Property/Details/<ParcelId>. Live-validated 2026-06-19 (TELLIE JONES / 4828 EASY ST).

fl_santa_rosa.description: Santa Rosa County Property Appraiser — Remix SPA at search.srcpa.gov (POST /property/query JSON) + Astro parcel detail at parcelview.srcpa.gov. No TOU gate. Live-validated 2026-06-19 (TIMOTHY WHITE / 1009 RIN CT).

fl_charlotte.description: Charlotte County Property Appraiser (classic ASP, IIS 8.5, no CF)
fl_charlotte.notes: Direct Show_Parcel.asp?acct=<APN> works with only homepage session cookie. Search: GET RPSearchEnter.asp → POST RPSearchQuery.asp → GET RPSearchSelect.asp (results) → GET Show_Parcel.asp. APN format: 12-digit numeric (e.g. 412024203012).

fl_marion.notes: pa.marion.fl.us has no A record (abandoned). Actual PA portal URL unknown — requires residential access to marioncountyfl.org to identify. The .org site blocks datacenter IP (Akamai 403). Unblock: residential proxy → navigate marioncountyfl.org → capture PA portal URL → probe.

fl_collier.notes: Custom jQuery frameset SPA. /Main_Search/RecordDetail.aspx returns 500→error.html regardless of session/headers — requires JS-populated session state from the frameset UI. Unblock: Playwright browser session inside frameset → capture RecordDetail.aspx XHR payload → mirror in HTTP adapter.

fl_osceola.notes: ocpaweb.osceola.org resolves (198.140.240.14) but all paths return 404 (IIS with no routes). Schneider qPublic CF-blocks datacenter. Unblock: residential IP → confirm if ocpaweb responds or if county migrated to new portal. If Schneider: existing qpublic_schneider_pa_http adapter + residential cf_clearance handles it.
